mechanism_description: Fragment-Blocked Self-Attention (FBSA): 序列按固定长度片段切分，片段内全连接自注意力，片段间通过可学习的 segment summary token 做二次 Transformer 融合；底层用双向 LSTM 注入局部 tick 惯性，再进入多头注意力栈。

tensor_contracts.raw_features: [B, T, 5]  # open, high, low, close, volume (z-scored)

source_papers.title: Temporal Fragment Attention for Ultra-High-Frequency Limit Order Books
source_papers.summary_preview: We propose fragmenting the limit order book stream into non-overlapping temporal chunks and applying masked self-attention within each chunk, then cross-chunk aggregation via a lightweight transformer. Experiments on syn…

source_papers.title: Transformer Encoders with Tick-Time Positional Encoding for Crypto Markets
source_papers.summary_preview: Tick-time positional encodings replace wall-clock embeddings for irregular crypto trades. Coupled with dilated causal convolutions before self-attention, the model captures multi-scale volatility bursts relevant to short…
